name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in university during freshman orientation. We bond over hiking, cooking new recipes, and terrible reality TV shows.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Brilliant product manager I've worked with for 3 years. Always brings fresh perspectives to tough problems.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: My cousin who moved to London two years ago. Incredibly warm and generous, I miss her laugh every day.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Running partner and fellow coffee addict. We met at a 5K race last year and have been training together since.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Former colleague turned great mentor. Taught me everything I know about design thinking and user research.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Childhood friend who moved abroad to teach English. Our reunions are legendary and always too short.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Talented illustrator I met at a design workshop in Tokyo. Her creativity inspires me to push my own boundaries.

name: James Wright
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia. We share the same taste in music, books, and obscure street food.

name: Nina Rossi
bio: Met during a study abroad semester in Italy. She has the best taste in food and wine of anyone I know.

name: Daniel Park
bio: Co-founder of a startup I briefly joined. Sharp thinker, relentlessly optimistic, and great at poker.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: My childhood neighbor who became a doctor. She still somehow finds time to send the most thoughtful birthday messages.

name: Leo Fontaine
bio: Guitarist I met at an open mic night three years ago. We jam together every few weeks and it always turns into a late night.
